assessment_items.question_content:
**Previous madonnas and even those by contemporary Sienese painters show Mary as [[☃ dropdown 1]], where Giotto shows her as [[☃ dropdown 2]].**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4630e7cf46f9d9139561e51b14868e66.jpg)
hints:
**Previous madonnas and even those by contemporary Sienese painters showed Mary as delicate and slender, where Giotto shows her as solid and monumental.**

**[Watch this video to review](https://www.khanacademy.org/humanities/art-history/art-history-1300-1400-proto-renaissance/florence/v/giotto--the-ognissanti-madonna--1306-10)**

assessment_items.question_content:
**Giotto used light and shadow to model Mary's body.**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/07614a0460beb6c639475f0a81c6d734.jpg)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
**This is correct. Giotto did use light and shadow to model Mary's body and make it look three-dimensional.**

**[Watch this video to review](https://www.khanacademy.org/humanities/art-history/art-history-1300-1400-proto-renaissance/florence/v/giotto--the-ognissanti-madonna--1306-10)**

assessment_items.question_content:
**Giotto begins to create an illusion of space to contain his carefully modeled representation of Mary.**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4630e7cf46f9d9139561e51b14868e66.jpg)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
**Giotto works towards a rational space and his figures appear three dimensional because of the use of modeling.**

**[Watch this video to review](https://www.khanacademy.org/humanities/art-history/art-history-1300-1400-proto-renaissance/florence/v/giotto--the-ognissanti-madonna--1306-10)**

assessment_items.question_content:
**Through the inclusion of Old Testament prophets, panel paintings of this time, such as Giotto's *Ognissanti Madonna* suggest that Christ and Mary initiate a new religion with no ties to past traditions.**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4630e7cf46f9d9139561e51b14868e66.jpg)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
**Through the inclusion of Old Testament prophets, panel paintings of this time, such as the *Ognissanti Madonna* suggests that Christ and Mary fulfill Old Testament prophecy.**

**[Watch this video to review](https://www.khanacademy.org/humanities/art-history/art-history-1300-1400-proto-renaissance/florence/v/giotto--the-ognissanti-madonna--1306-10)**
